name: Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare pan(s) with cooking spray and flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, egg whites, applesauce, and water.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients until just moistened.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan(s).
7. Bake 45 to 50 minutes depending on pan size.
